example_sentence: La desigualdad económica sigue siendo uno de los retos más grandes del país.
example_translation: Economic inequality continues to be one of the country's greatest challenges.

example_sentence: El cambio climático está afectando las temporadas de lluvia en México.
example_translation: Climate change is affecting the rainy seasons in Mexico.

example_sentence: La frontera entre México y Estados Unidos es una de las más transitadas del mundo.
example_translation: The border between Mexico and the US is one of the busiest in the world.

translation: to be accountable / to answer for one's actions
example_sentence: Los funcionarios públicos deben rendir cuentas a la ciudadanía.
example_translation: Public officials must be accountable to citizens.

translation: it is worrying that / it is concerning that (+ subjunctive)
example_sentence: Es preocupante que tantos jóvenes abandonen la escuela.
example_translation: It is worrying that so many young people are dropping out of school.

example_sentence: La brecha salarial entre hombres y mujeres persiste en muchos sectores.
example_translation: The wage gap between men and women persists in many sectors.

example_sentence: México se ha comprometido con los objetivos de desarrollo sostenible.
example_translation: Mexico has committed to sustainable development goals.

translation: there are those who argue that / some maintain that
example_sentence: Hay quienes sostienen que la reforma no va lo suficientemente lejos.
example_translation: There are those who argue that the reform doesn't go far enough.

example_sentence: La sociedad civil jugó un papel clave tras los terremotos del 85.
example_translation: Civil society played a key role after the 1985 earthquakes.

example_sentence: Los más afectados por la crisis son las familias de bajos ingresos.
example_translation: Those most affected by the crisis are low-income families.

example_sentence: La lucha contra la corrupción es una prioridad para muchos ciudadanos mexicanos.
example_translation: The fight against corruption is a priority for many Mexican citizens.

example_sentence: La sequía afectó gravemente la producción agrícola en el norte del país.
example_translation: The drought severely affected agricultural production in the north of the country.
